problem id: 0dd5caf4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(3)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  00000110 -> 00000000
  11100010 -> 00000001
  00110101 -> 00101000
  01100101 -> 00001000
  11001011 -> 00010001
  11010111 -> 10101001
  01111010 -> 11010000
  01001001 -> 00000000
  01010001 -> 10000000

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 00000000
